allEvents.title: Kanye West Antisemitic Statements and Industry Response
allEvents.location: Various social media platforms and interviews

sub_events.title: Initial Antisemitic Posts
sub_events.description: Kanye West posts antisemitic content on Twitter and Instagram, including threats against Jewish people

sub_events.title: Platform Restrictions Begin
sub_events.description: Social media platforms begin restricting West's accounts and removing violating content

sub_events.title: Industry Condemnation
sub_events.description: Entertainment industry figures and civil rights organizations issue statements condemning the antisemitic remarks

sub_events.title: Business Partnership Reviews
sub_events.description: Major brands including Adidas and Gap begin reviewing their partnerships with West

sub_events.title: Twitter Account Suspension
sub_events.description: Twitter suspends West's account following additional antisemitic posts

sub_events.title: Adidas Partnership Termination
sub_events.description: Adidas officially terminates its lucrative Yeezy partnership with West

allEvents.excerpt: Kanye West's antisemitic comments in October 2022 triggered immediate backlash from the entertainment industry, leading to terminated partnerships and widespread condemnation.
allEvents.summary: Series of antisemitic statements made by Kanye West across multiple platforms, resulting in widespread condemnation and business consequences.

allEvents.title: Michael Jackson Phone Call Leak

sub_events.title: Initial Phone Recording
sub_events.description: Phone conversation recorded between Jackson and unidentified caller discussing trial strategy and media concerns

sub_events.title: Media Leak Discovery
sub_events.description: Jackson's legal team becomes aware that private phone conversations have been recorded and may be leaked

sub_events.title: First Media Reports
sub_events.description: Initial media outlets begin reporting on the existence of recorded phone conversations

sub_events.title: Legal Response
sub_events.description: Jackson's attorneys file motions regarding the privacy breach and potential impact on trial proceedings

sub_events.title: Public Statement
sub_events.description: Jackson's representatives issue statement condemning the privacy violation and unauthorized recording

allEvents.excerpt: Private phone conversations between Michael Jackson and associates were leaked to media outlets, revealing his thoughts on trial proceedings and media management during the high-profile criminal case.
allEvents.summary: Leaked phone recordings reveal Michael Jackson's private conversations during his 2005 criminal trial, providing insight into his concerns about media coverage and legal strategy.
sources: ABC News - Phone Recording Report, February 2005
Entertainment Weekly - Privacy Breach Coverage, February 2005

allEvents.title: Michael Jackson 2005 Criminal Trial
allEvents.location: Santa Barbara County Superior Court, California
allEvents.excerpt: The People of the State of California v. Michael Joseph Jackson was a highly publicized criminal trial that lasted from January to June 2005, ending with Jackson's acquittal on all charges.
allEvents.summary: High-profile criminal trial of Michael Jackson on charges of child molestation, conspiracy, and providing alcohol to minors, resulting in acquittal on all counts.
